mapper.insert: insert into notice_tbl values ( notice_seq.nextval, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, sysdate, 0, #{noticePublic}, #{noticeFixed} )
mapper.select: select notice_no, notice_fixed, notice_title, notice_content, notice_date from notice_tbl order by notice_fixed desc, notice_date desc

select count(*) as totalMember, count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = trunc(sysdate, 'MM') then 1 end) as thisMonthMember, count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), -1) then 1 end) as lastMonthMember, count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate) then 1 end) as todayMember, count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate - 1) then 1 end) as yesterdayMember from member_tbl1
